'''Arkanian sweet milk''' was a creamy and very strong type of [[Mead/Legends|mead]]—a type of [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage—brewed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]].

{{Food-stub}}
